arts.ttl: Papers: Slot says Liverpool have moved on from failed Zubimendi move
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Ryan Gravenberch sends three-word message as Liverpool importance highlighted
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as Ryan Gravenberch sends a message after helping the Reds beat Bournemouth in the Premier League

arts.ttl: I broke my leg playing for Liverpool - but didn't realise until the next day
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Jamie Carragher recalls how he suffered a broken leg during a Liverpool match but did not find out until almost 24 hours later

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hails Liverpool's £25m transfer decision after Bournemouth win
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot talks up the importance of the Reds keeping goalkeeper Caoimhin Kelleher after their 3-0 victory over Bournemouth in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot discusses new Liverpool move for Martin Zubimendi after failed summer transfer
arts.sum: Reds boss talks up midfielder Ryan Gravenberch

arts.ttl: Liverpool 3-0 Bournemouth: Player ratings as Reds go top of Premier League
arts.sum: And that let-off only prompted Liverpool to start piling on the pressure, with Diaz, Mohamed Salah and Nunez all forcing Kepa Arrizabalaga into sharp saves in quick succession. CB: Ibrahima Konate - 7/10 - Cracked the game open with a ball over the top for Diaz and played a key role in stemming Bournemouth's attacking threat.

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz: Liverpool target first €100m signing as interest in Leverkusen ace confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in signing Bayer Leverkusen playmaker Florian Wirtz in a deal that would likely shatter the club’s transfer record. He has a contract now until 2027, so Leverkusen want a big fee for his services - €150m.

arts.ttl: Andoni Iraola facing touchline ban after referee mix-up
arts.sum: The manager was shown a yellow card in the game against Liverpool and will miss Bournemouth’s next match

arts.ttl: 11 Greatest Players from Liverpool in Football History [Ranked]
arts.sum: The city of Liverpool has produced a host of fine footballers, here are the greatest 11 scousers - ranked in order.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold reaches impressive Liverpool landmark in Bournemouth win
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold further cemented his place in Liverpool's history books after assisting Luis Diaz in the Reds' victory over Bournemouth on Saturday afternoon.
